title: NSUI moves Delhi High Court over CBSE OSM row; seeks probe
description: National Students’ Union of India (NSUI) has approached the Delhi High Court alleging widespread irregularities and technical failure in the Central Board of Secondary Education’s (CBSE) On-Screen Marking (OSM) system affecting class 12 students. Filed through NSUI President Vinod Jhakhar, the Public Interest Litigation (PIL) petition has sought directions from the Court to award compensatory marks to students whose answer scripts were missing, blurred or incorrectly evaluated. The ple
